steps: Monitor blood pressure and heart rate regularly as advised by your healthcare provider.
Keep a log of any symptoms such as palpitations, dizziness, or fatigue.
Adhere to the medication regimen prescribed by your cardiologist.
Schedule regular follow-up appointments to assess heart function.
Adopt a heart-healthy dietary pattern low in saturated fats and sodium.
Engage in moderate-intensity aerobic exercise, such as walking, if cleared by your doctor.
Avoid smoking and limit alcohol consumption to support cardiovascular health.
Be aware that symptoms such as severe chest pain, radiating pain to the arm or jaw, or sudden shortness of breath require immediate emergency evaluation.

reviewNotes: Standardized structure. Removed specific medication names. Clarified emergency warning.
